case_title: VEDDER PRICE P.C. VS. TERESA WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO ENTER JUDGMNT BY CONFESSION (TRANSACTION ID # 73537439) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEDDER PRICE P.C.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-08-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF VEDDER PRICE P.C.'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT BY CONFESSION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT BY CONFESSION" IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Enter Judgment By Confession
Off Calendar Aug-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. PETER WALROD, Esq. of Vedder Price (CA), LLP (tel: 415-749-9500) for Petitioner Vedder Price, PC.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF VEDDER PRICE P.C.'s Motion To Enter Judgment By Confession.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "motion to enter judgment by confession" is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
